popularStory.headline: Edmund Sutton's wife? wives?
popularStory.description:
There are several references to Edmund Sutton's spouse...or spouses. Some record her as being Joyce Tiptoft, while others list her as being Matilda (Maud) Clifford. Still others list both of them.
For …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Sutton於1425年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利杜德利 卡素時，他的父親Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley25歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Berkeley26歲。他於1459年與Lady Joyce Tibetot在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Sutton was born in 1425, in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley, was 25 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, was 26. He married Lady Joyce Tibetot in 1459, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1485, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Sutton est né en 1425, à Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joyce Tibetot en 1459, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1485, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Sutton 1425 in Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley 25 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Berkeley 26. Er hat 1459 in Worcestershire, England Lady Joyce Tibetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

Lui sposato Lady Joyce Tibetot nel 1459, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1485, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Suttonが1425年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーダドリー カストルで生まれた時，父Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudleyは25歳，母Lady Elizabeth Berkeleyは26歳であった。1459年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでLady Joyce Tibetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年に60歳で死去した。

ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Sutton(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Berkeley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Lady Joyce Tibetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Sutton родился в 1425 г. в местности дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joyce Tibetot в 1459 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1485 г. в возрасте 60 лет.
